name: Rain Enhancement Technologies Holdco, Inc.
business: Rain Enhancement Technologies Holdco, Inc. develops, manufactures, and commercializes Atmospheric Energy Injection (AEI) technology to enhance rainfall and snowfall. The company's proprietary WETA platform integrates software, meteorology, and hardware to make rain and snowfall generation more dependable.
sellsTo: large landowners including agriculture, resorts, energy and transportation companies
decarbonization initiatives of major corporations and philanthropists
city, county, state, federal and non-U.S. governments

exposures.sentence: We aim to develop, improve and commercialize AEI technology that enhances rainfall and snowfall when conditions are appropriate in the atmosphere.
In October 2025, we announced preliminary field observations from a fog-mitigation pilot conducted in Australia using our WETA platform.

catalysts.event: Preliminary field observations from fog-mitigation pilot announced
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we announced preliminary field observations from a fog-mitigation pilot conducted in Australia using our WETA platform.

catalysts.event: First two US installed systems entered operation
catalysts.sentence: Our first two US installed systems entered operation in November 2025.

catalysts.event: Service agreement with Utah Division of Water Resources
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we entered into a service agreement with the Utah Division of Water Resources to support the installation of a generator to facilitate radiometer data ingestion associated with our rainfall monitoring infrastructure.

catalysts.event: Approval of repayment terms for line of credit
catalysts.sentence: On March 11, 2026, the Compensation Committee and the Board approved repayment of the amounts due under the Loan Agreement of up to 30% of any amount received by the Company from any potential future capital raise net of any underwriting, legal, and accounting fees and related costs.

catalysts.event: Line of credit increased from $7 million to $10 million
catalysts.sentence: On March 24, 2026, the Audit Committee and the Board approved an increase in the amount that could be borrowed under the Loan Agreement from $7,000,000 to $10,000,000.
